name: ESP32 Hardware
description: Digital I/O and sensors for ESP32 via micro-ROS

subcategory_hints.Digital Output: Use esp32_set_pin_on/off for blinking LEDs or controlling single GPIO pins. Do NOT use RGB LED blocks for simple on/off pin control.
subcategory_hints.Sensors: Ultrasonic distance sensor (HC-SR04). Returns distance in cm via a variable.
subcategory_hints.RGB LED: For controlling 3-pin RGB LEDs with color mixing. Only use these if the user specifically asks for colors or an RGB LED.

blocks.ai_description: Turn a single GPIO pin HIGH (3.3V). Use for blinking LEDs, activating relays, or any digital output.
Turn a single GPIO pin LOW (0V). Use together with esp32_set_pin_on to blink LEDs.
Setup HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor. Distance readings in cm are continuously stored in the chosen variable.

definition.tooltip: Configure HC-SR04 sensor. Distance readings (cm) are stored in the chosen variable.

blocks.ai_description: Setup a 3-pin RGB LED. Only use when the user wants color control with separate R/G/B channels.

definition.tooltip: Configure a 4-pin RGB LED by assigning the red, green, and blue GPIO pins.
Set the RGB LED to a custom color (0-255 per channel).
Set the RGB LED to a preset color.
